data.note: Evidence was stored as a durable JSON record. Include this path or the published artifact URL in downstream briefings.

data.driver_policy: persistence plus linear slope clipping within observed bounds

data.title: Steam reforming and shift closure under constrained feed-gas margin
data.objective: Verify that the aligned forcing envelope reproduces the forecasted H2/CO ratio and methane slip under fixed-bed Ni/Al2O3 operation.

measurements.gc_tcd_h2_co_ratio: Use calibrated GC-TCD peak areas for H2 and CO at steady state.
measurements.gc_fid_methane_slip_pct: Use GC-FID methane peak area with external standard calibration.
measurements.carbon_balance_pct: Report inlet vs outlet carbon closure.

expected_outputs.expected_output_type: Chromatogram peak areas for H2, CO, CH4, CO2 and derived ratio/slip values.

acceptance_criteria.h2_co_ratio: Accept if measured H2/CO is within +/- 0.145 of the forecast.
acceptance_criteria.methane_slip_pct: Accept if methane slip is within +/- 1.266 percentage points.

data.title: CO2 hydrogenation to methanol with GC and ATR-FTIR readout
data.objective: Check whether the forecasted methanol selectivity and methoxy band ratio remain coupled when pressure and recycle are adjusted inside the aligned envelope.

measurements.gc_fid_methanol_selectivity_pct: Integrate methanol, CO, and CO2 peaks after condensation and calibration.
measurements.atr_ftir_methoxy_ratio: Report the 1030 cm^-1 to 1380 cm^-1 band area ratio.
measurements.condensate_mass_balance_pct: Report condensate yield relative to carbon feed.

expected_outputs.expected_output_type: GC peak areas and ATR-FTIR methoxy-band ratios.

acceptance_criteria.methanol_selectivity_pct: Accept if selectivity is within +/- 3.887 percentage points.
acceptance_criteria.ftir_methoxy_ratio: Accept if the 1030/1380 ratio is within +/- 0.059.

data.title: Ammonium carbamate to urea closure with FTIR and ion chromatography
data.objective: Test the nitrogen branch directly with an aligned carbamate-to-urea conversion and downstream nitrate assay.

measurements.isolated_urea_yield_pct: Dry the isolated solid and report gravimetric yield.
measurements.atr_ftir_urea_carbonyl_ratio: Report the 1680 cm^-1 to 1460 cm^-1 band area ratio.
measurements.ic_nitrate_mg_l: Measure nitrate in the hydrolysis liquor by ion chromatography.

expected_outputs.expected_output_type: Isolated yield %, ATR-FTIR band ratio, ion chromatogram nitrate concentration.

acceptance_criteria.urea_yield_pct: Accept if isolated yield is within +/- 4.233 percentage points.
acceptance_criteria.nitrate_mg_l: Accept if nitrate is within +/- 0.447 mg/L.

data.title: Synthetic seawater polishing with conductivity and nitrate validation
data.objective: Verify the water-service branch by coupling chloride load to permeate conductivity and nitrate burden in a bench RO loop.

measurements.permeate_conductivity_uScm: Measure permeate conductivity after 30 min steady operation.
measurements.ic_nitrate_mg_l: Measure nitrate in the permeate or polishing stream by ion chromatography.
measurements.flux_decline_pct: Report normalized water flux decline over the run.

expected_outputs.expected_output_type: Conductivity trace, ion chromatogram nitrate peak, normalized flux decline.

acceptance_criteria.permeate_conductivity_uScm: Accept if conductivity is within +/- 15.972 uS/cm.
acceptance_criteria.nitrate_mg_l: Accept if nitrate is within +/- 0.447 mg/L.
